title: Databricks Apps supports uv for Python dependency management
body: You can now use `uv` to manage Python dependencies in your Databricks apps using `pyproject.toml` and `uv.lock`. See [Define Python dependencies with `uv`](/aws/en/dev-tools/databricks-apps/dependencies#uv-dependencies) and [Deployment logic](/aws/en/dev-tools/databricks-apps/deploy#deployment-logic).
